figures.caption: Figure 1. A Human-Centric Perspective on MAAI systems. This schema illustrates an AIautomated workflow with n tasks: A human initiator (A) submits an input request, which is processed by a Multi-Agent AI (B). This can include AI-based agents and human agents who may or may not be the original initiator. It can also contain interfaces to external data and services. The output is then delivered to a human subject (C), who also may or may not be the original initiator.
Figure 5. Extracted archetypes addressing the fairness desiderata of MAAI systems.
Figure 2. PRISMA flowchart illustrating the literature review process.
